payload.query: One of the central questions for comparative legislative scholars is what explains the relationship between executives and legislatures. How does the existing literature answer this question? What is the most important factor(s) that determine this relationship?

articles.title: Read the Court Ruling on Trump’s Use of the Alien Enemies Act
articles.abstract: The ruling was a setback for the Trump administration on the mass deportation of immigrants, one of its domestic policy goals.
articles.snippet: The ruling was a setback for the Trump administration on the mass deportation of immigrants, one of its domestic policy goals.

articles.title: The Supreme Court’s Decision on Transgender Care for Minors, Annotated
articles.abstract: The Supreme Court upholds Tennessee’s ban on transgender care for minors.

articles.title: Read the Alabama Judge’s Ruling
articles.abstract: A federal judge ruled that Alabama could not prosecute doctors and reproductive health organizations for helping patients travel out of the state to obtain abortions.
articles.snippet: A federal judge ruled that Alabama could not prosecute doctors and reproductive health organizations for helping patients travel out of the state to obtain abortions.

articles.title: Lawrence Summers Will Resign From Harvard After Epstein Revelations
articles.abstract: Mr. Summers, former president of the school, had stepped back from teaching after documents showed a closer relationship to Jeffrey Epstein than previously known. He will leave at the end of the academic year.
articles.snippet: Mr. Summers, former president of the school, had stepped back from teaching after documents showed a closer relationship to Jeffrey Epstein than previously known. He will leave at the end of the academic year.

articles.title: Fresh Off a Supreme Court Loss, Trump Could Face New Challenges on Tariffs
articles.abstract: Critics are questioning the legality of the provision President Trump has used to replace his previous slate of tariffs, raising the prospect of yet another legal battle.
articles.snippet: Critics are questioning the legality of the provision President Trump has used to replace his previous slate of tariffs, raising the prospect of yet another legal battle.

articles.abstract: On what makes Congress secret and toxic.

articles.title: Employment Commission Says Agencies Can Restrict Bathroom Use by Sex
articles.abstract: The ruling extends the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission’s intervention on President Trump’s gender and race priorities.
articles.snippet: The ruling extends the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission’s intervention on President Trump’s gender and race priorities.

articles.title: Read the Nebraska Supreme Court Ruling on Voting Rights for Felons
articles.abstract: The decision affirmed a law passed by the Legislature this year clearing the way for people to cast ballots immediately after finishing prison and parole terms.
articles.snippet: The decision affirmed a law passed by the Legislature this year clearing the way for people to cast ballots immediately after finishing prison and parole terms.

articles.title: Divide Among Supreme Court’s Conservatives Could Test Trump’s Agenda
articles.abstract: In rejecting President Trump’s tariffs, the court’s six conservative justices displayed subtle differences in their views of executive power.
articles.snippet: In rejecting President Trump’s tariffs, the court’s six conservative justices displayed subtle differences in their views of executive power.
